note: Hand-authored semantic regression set. Each query should retrieve at least one of `expect` in the top-3 doc neighbors (deterministic cosine, no LLM). Authored from vault content; see docs/ingestion-spec.md M4 for the rubric.

queries.q: cutting cross-AZ and cross-datacenter network cost for consumers
consumers reading from a nearby copy instead of the primary
remove the ZooKeeper dependency from Kafka
queue semantics with many competing consumers on a topic
tiered storage for cheap long retention of old data
stop-the-world rebalance pauses the whole consumer group
turn on producer idempotence by default
log divergence and truncation using leader epoch on recovery
fetch request overhead grows with many partitions
